{{Quote|O-625 to Blackhole... suspect is leaving his ship... heading toward the west end of the space-port!|O-625|<ref name="Gambler's World">"[[Gambler's World]]"</ref>}}
'''O-625''' was a [[Shadow stormtrooper/Legends|shadow stormtrooper]] serving under [[Cronal]]. In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], he was among the Blackhole agents who surveyed [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] on [[Vorzyd V/Legends|Vorzyd V]]. He tracked Skywalker until he lost him in [[district 3054]] and had to alert the surface [[surveillance team]] in that area.
